payload.title: Sync protocol: /sync pull + push endpoints
payload.description: Add tenant-scoped GET /sync/pull?since=<ulid> and POST /sync/push to the hub. Pull returns events after the ULID watermark in compareEvents order with {cursor,count,more}. Push validates, unions onto the canonical log (atomic, dedupe by ULID), re-runs replayInto, returns {accepted,duplicates,renumbered,cursor}. Must reuse replay.js/identity.js unchanged so server state == local file-union replay. Calls the SCP-124 union-insert primitive. (From SCP-123.)
